header_title.description: App name shown in the header. A recipe discovery app for world cuisines.

header_subtitle.description: Tagline shown below the app name in the header.

home_page_hero_title.description: Main heading on the home page hero section.

home_page_hero_subtitle.text: Vinakili mapishi halisi kutoka jikoni za duniani kote
home_page_hero_subtitle.description: Subtitle text displayed under the hero heading on the home page.

home_page_featured_title.description: Section heading displayed above the recipe card grid.

recipe_card_cooking_time.description: Cooking time label on a recipe card. {minutes} is replaced with the number of minutes.

recipe_card_difficulty.description: Label displayed before the difficulty level on a recipe card.

recipe_card_easy.description: Difficulty level label indicating an easy recipe.

recipe_card_medium.description: Difficulty level label indicating a moderately difficult recipe.

recipe_card_hard.description: Difficulty level label indicating a difficult recipe.

recipe_card_ramen_name.description: Jina la mapishi ya Tonkotsu Ramen.

recipe_card_ramen_description.text: Mchuzi tajiri wa mfupa wa nguruwe wenye chashu laini, yai lililopikwa kwa upole, na tambi safi.
recipe_card_ramen_description.description: Maelezo ya mapishi ya Tonkotsu Ramen.

recipe_card_margherita_name.description: Jina la mapishi ya Piza ya Margherita.

recipe_card_margherita_description.text: Piza ya Neapolitan ya jadi yenye nyanya za San Marzano, mozzarella safi, na basil.
recipe_card_margherita_description.description: Maelezo ya mapishi ya Piza ya Margherita.

recipe_card_tacos_name.description: Jina la mapishi ya Tacos al Pastor.

recipe_card_tacos_description.text: Tacos za nguruwe zilizochochewa na nanasi, cilantro, na kitunguu kwenye tortillas za mahindi.
recipe_card_tacos_description.description: Maelezo ya mapishi ya Tacos al Pastor.

recipe_card_butter_chicken_name.description: Jina la mapishi ya Kuku wa Siagi.

recipe_card_butter_chicken_description.text: Kuku laini katika mchuzi wa nyanya na siagi wenye viungo vyenye harufu nzuri.
recipe_card_butter_chicken_description.description: Maelezo ya mapishi ya Kuku wa Siagi.

recipe_card_pad_thai_name.description: Jina la mapishi ya Pad Thai.

recipe_card_pad_thai_description.text: Tambi za mchele zilizokaangwa na kamba, tofu, karanga, na mchuzi wa tamarind.
recipe_card_pad_thai_description.description: Maelezo ya mapishi ya Pad Thai.

recipe_card_crepes_name.description: Jina la mapishi ya Crepes za Kifaransa.

recipe_card_crepes_description.text: Crepes nyembamba, nyororo zilizojaa Nutella, jordgubbar safi, na krimu iliyopigwa.
recipe_card_crepes_description.description: Maelezo ya mapishi ya Crepes za Kifaransa.

locale_switcher_label.description: Accessible label for the language switcher dropdown in the header.

locale_switcher_en.description: English language option in the locale switcher.

locale_switcher_ja.description: Japanese language option in the locale switcher.

locale_switcher_es.description: Spanish language option in the locale switcher.
